---
title: "Churn Data Exploration"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load Libraries

```{r libraries}
library(readxl)
```

## Load Data

```{r load-data}
calls    <- read_xls("CallsData.xls")
contract <- read.csv("ContractData.csv", stringsAsFactors = TRUE)
```

## Calls Data

### Structure

```{r calls-str}
str(calls)
```

### Summary

```{r calls-summary}
summary(calls)
```

## Contract Data

### Structure

```{r contract-str}
str(contract)
```

### Summary

```{r contract-summary}
summary(contract)
```
